name: forward_render_static
description: Still frame of the loaded scene on the forward pipeline, FLIP-compared against the published ground truth.

name: deferred_render_static
description: Still frame of the loaded scene on the deferred pipeline, FLIP-compared against the published ground truth.

name: gpu_render_static
description: Still frame on the gpu path-tracing pipeline, FLIP-compared against the published ground truth. Needs hardware ray tracing, which no hosted runner exposes, so it stays local-only.

name: cpu_render_static
description: Still frame on the cpu path-tracing pipeline, FLIP-compared against the published ground truth. Too slow for CI runners, so it stays local-only.

name: camera_nudge_return
description: Camera drag-out-and-return round trip; the evaluator FLIP-compares the before and after screenshots.

name: usd_round_trip
description: Render, export to USD, reload and re-render; the evaluator FLIP-compares the two screenshots.

name: usd_loader_semantics
description: USD decoded texture color-space and storage semantics.

name: input_injection
description: Synthetic mouse and touch sequences through InputManager::Push.

name: cooker_request
description: Cooker cache-hit delivery and relocated-content contracts.

name: image_io
description: Image file content detection, channel normalization, storage sizing, and synchronous writes.

name: scene_load_failure
description: Scene async failure propagation for a missing authored sky resource.

name: render_target_pool
description: RHIRenderTargetPool reuse and release semantics on the render thread.

name: pipeline_switch_pool
description: Runtime pipeline switch and pooled render-target reuse.

name: ibl_parity
description: CPU IBL cook jobs compared against their GPU producers. Needs a physical GPU; its deliberate artifact recook is incompatible with --require_cooked, so CI never runs it.

name: nrd_probe
description: Cooked ReBLUR pipelines compile to PSOs on the current GPU. Apple platforms only.

name: nrd_runtime_toggle
description: Runtime NRD enable during and after accumulation.
